hero.title: pretext
hero.tagline: Pure JavaScript/TypeScript library for multiline text measurement & layout. Fast, accurate & supports all the languages you didn't even know about. Allows rendering to DOM, Canvas, SVG and soon, server side.
hero.description: Pure JavaScript/TypeScript library for multiline text measurement & layout. Fast, accurate & supports all the languages you didn't even know about. Allows rendering to DOM, Canvas, SVG and soon, server side.

highlights.title: Grounded In The Actual Stack
highlights.description: The page reflects the repository's real implementation, led by TypeScript (90%), HTML (10%).

highlights.title: Shareable By Default
highlights.description: A repo link becomes a cleaner page with quick context, proof signals, and a better first read.

features: is about for the shared 500 text batch
is about for that same batch
fancy userland layouts: masonry, JS driven flexbox like implementations, nudging a few layout values without CSS hacks (imagine that), etc.
development time verification (especially now with AI) that labels on e.g. buttons don't overflow to the next line, browser free
prevent layout shift when new text loads and you wanna re anchor the scroll position
